narrative:
Franklin Twp township has 1,197 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.0 percentage points.
